news.title: Iran is in the 'process of blinking' over the Strait of Hormuz, Petraeus says
news.summary: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions. Petraeus said the deal would be in place within two to three years.

news.title: Oil market at 'tank bottoms' in Asia, and Europe isn't far behind, warns market veteran Jeff Currie
news.summary: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, says Carlyle's Jeff Currie. Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, he says.

news.title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
news.summary: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities. The move comes despite U.S. restrictions on the company.

news.title: When are prediction markets most helpful? Evercore ISI has a formula
news.summary: Evercore ISI strategists provide insight into when prediction markets are useful for forecasting. Evercore ISI: When prediction markets can be used to forecast the future.

news.title: Boosting retirement savings has a less-appreciated benefit
news.summary: Saving more money has a dual benefit that often goes unnoticed, financial advisors say. Saving more money can help you save more money and save more in the long run.

news.title: I inherited a house. My CPA says I should sell within a year to avoid capital gains. Is he right?
news.summary: “We plan to sell it to another family member for the appraised value,” the family says. “We’re not selling it to anyone else. We just want to keep it.”

news.title: These underdogs are a big reason S&P 500 profit growth is the fastest in nearly 5 years
news.summary: Seven companies have done the heavy lifting for overall S&P 500 earnings growth. But more recently, the other 493 names in the index have started to pull their weight.

news.title: I’m selling my $1 million home. Will my agent really charge less than a 6% commission?
news.summary: “I haven’t bought or sold property since the National Association of Realtors ruling that decoupled buyer’s and sellers’ agent commissions,” she says.

news.title: Mastercard’s stock is up 11,000% since its IPO 20 years ago. What comes next?
news.summary: Among S&P 500 components, only Nvidia and Apple shares have performed better over the two-decade span since the card company’s IPO.

news.title: ‘There is zero transparency’: My friend’s sister controls their mother’s estate. How can we stop her from stealing?
news.summary: "The sister claims she does not have to explain herself to anyone," says her lawyer. "She does not need to be explained to anyone,” he adds.
